heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: Preliminary Homage
content: Namo tassa bhagavato arahato sammāsambuddhassa

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 01. Invitation
content:
yāvatā bhagavā loke - tiṭṭheyya tava sāsanaṃ;

tāvatā patigaṇhātu - pūjā lokānukampayā.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 02. Offering lamps and candles
content:
veneyyahadaye moha - tamokkhandhavinodakaṃ

dīpanetena pūjemi - paññādīpadharaṃ jinaṃ

iminā puññakammena - paññavā sīlavā sadā

bhavitvāhaṃ labhe sīghaṃ - dhammacakkhuṃ anuttaraṃ

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 03. Offering incense
content:
desetvā pavaraṃ dhammaṃ - pāpāmagandha nāsakaṃ

sugandhinā’haṃ gandhena - pūjemi lokanāyakaṃ

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 04. Offering drinking water
content:
dhammodakena sattānaṃ - pāpamala visodhakaṃ

pānīyenābhipūjemi - lokanāthaṃ dayālayaṃ

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 05. Offering Permissible Drinks:
content:
tidosasamanaṃ deha - baladaṃ āyuvaḍḍhanaṃ

gilānapaccayaṃ etaṃ - paṇītaṃ madhuraṃ suciṃ

mahādayassa pūjemi - kilesāmayahārino

puññenetena pappomi - sabbasaññojanakkhayaṃ

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 06. Medicinal Betel
content:
yathāvādī tathākārī - dhammavādī mahāyaso

tāmbūlaṃ patigaṇhātu – satthā loke anuttaro.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 07. Offering Flower:
content:
ananta guṇavaṇṇassa - suddhasīlasugandhino

pūjemi lokanāthassa -pupphametaṃ manoramaṃ

iminā puññakammena - bhavitvā sīlavā sadā

pappomi paramaṃ santiṃ - nibbānaṃ buddhavaṇṇitaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 08. Offering Flags:
content:
dhammaddhajadharaṃ dhīraṃ - dhajuggata mahāyasaṃ

dhajenetena pūjemi - dhammarājaṃ dhajūpamaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 09. Parikkhāra pūjā (Offering requisites):
content:
samatthaṃ appakārampi - karaṇe vipulapphalaṃ

parikkhārena pūjemi - acinteyya guṇaṃ jinaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 10. Buddha-Vandanā (Homage to the Buddha):
content:
itipi so bhagavā arahaṃ sammāsambuddho vijjācaraṇa sampanno sugato lokavidū anuttaro purisadamma sārathi satthā devamanussānaṃ buddho bhagavāti.

So bhagavā itipi arahaṃ, arahaṃ vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ arahantaṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato arahato attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato arahato, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Ārakattā hatattā ca - kilesārīna so munī,

hata saṃsāra cakkāro - paccayādīna cāraho,

na raho karoti pāpāni - arahaṃ taṃ namāmahaṃ.

So bhagavā itipi sammāsambuddho, sammāsambuddho vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ sammāsambuddhaṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato sammāsambuddhassa attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato sammāsambuddhassa, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Sammāsambuddha saddhamma - sammāsambuddha desana,

sammāsambuddha ñeyyassa - sammāsambuddha te namo.

So bhagavā itipi vijjācaraṇa sampanno, vijjācaraṇa sampanno vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ vijjācaraṇa sampannaṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato vijjācaraṇa sampannassa attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato vijjācaraṇa sampannassa, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Vijjācaraṇasampanno - tisso vijjā pakāsitā,

aṭṭhavijjā pañcadasa - caraṇaṃ taṃ namāmahaṃ,

so bhagavā itipi sugato, sugato vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ sugataṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato sugatassa attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato sugatassa, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Sugatattā sugattattā - sobhanā yassa vā gati,

gatattā sundaraṃ ṭhānaṃ - sugato nāma te namo.

So bhagavā itipi lokavidū, lokavidū vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ lokaviduṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato lokaviduno attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato lokaviduno, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Sattāvāsādi saṃkhāte - kāmarūpādike tathā,

saṃkhāra-satta-mokāsa - loke yo vedi taṃ name.

So bhagavā itipi anuttaro purisadammasārathi, anuttaro purisadammasārathi vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ anuttaraṃ purisadammasārathiṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato anuttarassa purisadamma sārathino attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato anuttarassa purisadammasārathino, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Yo loke anuttaro deva - brahmāsuranarorage,

damesi damme purise - sārathiṃ taṃ namāmahaṃ.

So bhagavā itipi satthā devamanussānaṃ, satthā devamanussānaṃ vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ satthāraṃ devamanussānaṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato satthuno devamanussānaṃ attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato satthuno devamanussānaṃ, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Dātā tibhavasampattiṃ - netā sivapuraṃ varaṃ,

satthā devamanussānaṃ - taṃ namāmi naruttamaṃ.

So bhagavā itipi buddho, buddho vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ buddhaṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato buddhassa attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato buddhassa, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Catusacca mabujjhittha - bodhetā yo pajāya ca,

sāmaṃ saccāni sambujjhi - taṃ buddhaṃ paṇamāmahaṃ.

So bhagavā itipi bhagavā, bhagavā vata so bhagavā, taṃ bhagavantaṃ bhagavantaṃ sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato bhagavato attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato bhagavato, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Bhāgyavā bhaggavā yutto - bhagehi ca vibhattavā,

bhavesu vantagamano - bhagavā nāma te namo.

Atītā ye ca sambuddhā - ye ca buddhā anāgatā,

paccuppannā ca ye buddhā - ahaṃ vandāmi sabbadā

natthi me saraṇaṃ aññaṃ - buddho me saraṇaṃ varaṃ,

etena saccavajjena - hotu me jayamaṃgalaṃ.

Uttamaṃgena vandehaṃ - pādapaṃsuvaruttamaṃ,

buddhe yo khalito doso - buddho khamatu taṃ mamaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 11. Dhamma-vandanā (Homage to the Dhamma):
content:
svakkhāto bhagavatā dhammo sandiṭṭhiko akāliko ehipassiko opanayiko paccattaṃ veditabbo viññūhīti.

Svākkhāto vata tassa bhagavato so dhammo, sandiṭṭhiko vata tassa bhagavato so dhammo, akāliko vata tassa bhagavato so dhammo,

ehipassiko vata tassa bhagavato so dhammo, opanayiko vata tassa bhagavato so dhammo,

paccattaṃ veditabbo viññūhi vata tassa bhagavato so dhammo,

taṃ svākkhātaṃ bhagavato dhammaṃ sandiṭṭhikaṃ akālikaṃ ehipassikaṃ opanayikaṃ paccattaṃ veditabbaṃ viññūhi sirasā namāmi. Tassa bhagavato dhammassa attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato dhammassa, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

atītā ye ca saddhammā - ye ca dhammā anāgatā, paccuppannā ca ye dhammā - ahaṃ vandāmi sabbadā

natthi me saraṇaṃ aññaṃ - dhammo me saraṇaṃ varaṃ, etena saccavajjena - hotu me jayamaṃgalaṃ.

Uttamaṃgena vandehaṃ - dhammaṃ ca tividhaṃ varaṃ, dhamme yo khalito doso - dhammo khamatu taṃ mamaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 12. Saṅgha-vandanā (Homage to the Sangha):
content:
supaṭipanno bhagavato sāvaka saṅgho, ujupaṭipanno bhagavato sāvaka saṅgho, ñāyapaṭipanno bhagavato sāvaka saṅgho, sāmīcipaṭipanno bhagavato sāvaka saṅgho, yadidaṃ cattāri purisa yugāni aṭṭha purisa puggalā esa bhagavato sāvaka saṅgho, āhuneyyo, pāhuneyyo, dakkhiṇeyyo, añjalikaraṇīyo, anuttaraṃ puññakkhettaṃ lokassāti.

Supaṭipanno vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho, ujupaṭipanno vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

ñāyapaṭipanno vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

sāmīcipaṭipanno vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho, āhuneyyo vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

pāhuneyyo vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

dakkhiṇeyyo vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

añjalikaraṇīyo vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho, anuttaraṃ puññakkhettaṃ lokassa vata so bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho,

taṃ bhagavato sāvaka saṅghaṃ supaṭipannaṃ ujupaṭipannaṃ ñāyapaṭipannaṃ sāmīcipaṭipannaṃ āhuneyyaṃ pāhuneyyaṃ dakkhiṇeyyaṃ añjalikaraṇīyaṃ anuttaraṃ puññakkhettaṃ lokassa sirasā namāmi.

Tassa bhagavato sāvakasaṅghassa attānaṃ pariccajāmi, pariccattoyeva me attā tassa bhagavato sāvakasaṅghassa, sāvako hamasmi, sisso hamasmi.

Ye ca saṅghā atītā ca - ye ca saṅghā anāgatā, paccuppannā ca ye saṅghā - ahaṃ vandāmi sabbadā natthi me saraṇaṃ aññaṃ - saṅgho me saraṇaṃ varaṃ, etena sacca vajjena - hotu me jayamaṃgalaṃ.

Uttamaṃgena vandehaṃ - saṅghaṃ ca tividhottamaṃ,

Saṅghe yo khalito doso - saṅgho khamatu taṃ mamaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 13. Cetiya vandanā (Veneration of pagodas, etc.):
content:
sabbapāpavisuddhassa - anantaguṇa dhārino,

namāmi lokanāthassa - sādaraṃ dhātu cetiyaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 14. Catu Saṃvejanīya-ṭhāna-vandanā:
content:
māyā suto sugata sākiya sīhanātho - jātakkhaṇe sapadasā vabhisaṃkamitvā;

yasmiṃ udīrayi giraṃ varalumbiṇimhi - taṃ jāta cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Yasmiṃ nisajja vajirāsana bandhanena - jetvā savāsana kilesa balaṃ munindo;

sambodhi ñāṇamavagamma vihāsi sammā - taṃ bodhi cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Saṅkampayaṃ dasasahassiya loka dhātuṃ - desesi yatra bhagavā vara dhamma cakkaṃ;

barāṇasīpura samīpa vane migānaṃ - taṃ dhamma cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Katvāna loka hitamatta hitañca nātho - āsītikova upavattana kānanamhi;

yasmiṃ nipajja gatavā nirupādhisesaṃ - nibbāna cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 15. Dhātu-Cetiya Vandanā
content: buddhaṃ dhammaṃ ca saṃghaṃ sugatatanubhavā dhātuyo dhātugabbhe laṅkāyaṃ jambudīpe tidasapuravare nāgaloke ca thūpe sabbe buddhassa bimbe sakaladasadise kesalomādi dhātuṃ vande sabbepi buddhaṃ dasabalatanujaṃ bodhicetiyaṃ sirasā namāmi.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 16. Veneration of all Cetiya:
content:
vandāmi cetiyaṃ sabbaṃ - sabbaṭhānesu patiṭṭhitaṃ sārīrika dhātu mahā bodhiṃ - buddharūpaṃ sakalaṃ sadā.

……..dhamma desanā……..

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 18. Āṭānāṭiya Gāthā
content:
vipassissa namatthu - cakkhumantassa sirīmato

sikhissapi namatthu - sabba bhūtānukampino

vessabhussa namatthu - nahātakassa tapassino namatthu kakusandhassa - mārasenā pamaddino

koṇāgamanassa namatthu - brāhmaṇassa vusīmato

kassapassa namatthu - vippamuttassa sabbadhi

Aṅgīrasassa namatthu - sakyaputtassa sirīmato namo tesaṃ sattannaṃ - sammāsambuddhānanti.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 19. Homage to all the Buddhas
content:
Paṭhavī bala sundarī - sabbaññu bodhi maṇḍalaṃ asaṃkhyeṃ mārasenaṃ - jayo jayatu maṃgalaṃ kakusandho koṇāgamano - kassapo gotamo munī

metteyyo pañca buddhā te - sīse me sentu sabbadā etesaṃ ānubhāvena - yakkhā devā mahiddhikā sabbepi sukhitā hontu - mama mittā sahāyakā sambuddhe aṭṭhavīsaṃ ca - dvādasaṃ ca sahassake pañcasatasahassāni - namāmi sirasādaraṃ appakā vālukā gaṃgā - anantā nibbutā jinā

tesaṃ dhammañca saṃghañca - ādarena namāmyahaṃ namakkārānubhāvena - hitvā sabbe upaddave anekā antarāyāpi - vinassantu asesato.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 20. Ovāda Pātimokkha
content:
khantī paramaṃ tapo titikkhā - nibbānaṃ paramaṃ vadanti buddhā

na hi pabbajito parūpaghātī - samaṇo hoti paraṃ viheṭhayanto sabba pāpassa akaraṇaṃ - kusalassa upasampadā sacittapariyodapanaṃ - etaṃ buddhānasāsanaṃ.

Anūpavādo anūpaghāto - pātimokkhe ca saṃvaro mattaññutā ca bhattasmiṃ - panthañca sayanāsanaṃ adhicitte ca āyogo - etaṃ buddhānasāsanaṃ.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 21. Vipassanā Gāthā
content:
sabbe saṃkhārā aniccāti - yadā paññāya passati atha nibbindatī dukkhe - esa maggo visuddhiyā

sabbe saṃkhārā dukkhāti - yadā paññāya passati atha nibbindatī dukkhe - esa maggo visuddhiyā sabbe dhammā anattāti - yadā paññāya passati

atha nibbindatī dukkhe - esa maggo visuddhiyā.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 22. Sharing Merits
content:
Dīrgha puṇyānumodanāva hā prārthanā gāthā:

Iminā puññakammena - upajjhāyā guṇuttarā ācariyupakārā ca - mātā pitā piyā mamaṃ

suriyo candimā rājā - guṇavantā narāpi ca brahmā mārā ca indā ca - lokapālā ca devatā

yamo mittā manussā ca - majjhattā verikāpi ca sabbe sattā sukhī hontu - puññāni pakatāni me.

Sukhaṃ ca tividhaṃ dentu - khippaṃ pāpetha vomataṃ iminā puñña kammena - iminā uddisena ca

khippāhantu labhe ceva - taṇhūpādāna chedanaṃ ye santāne hīnā dhammā - yāva nibbānato mamaṃ

nassantu sabbadāyeva - yattha jāto bhave bhave

ujucitto satī pañño - sallekho viriyavāminā

mārā labhantu nokāsaṃ - kātuṃ ca viriye tu me buddho dīpavaro nātho - dhammo nātho varuttamo

nātho paccekasambuddho - saṃgho nāthottaro mamaṃ tesottamānubhāvena - mārokāsaṃ labhantu mā.

Bhavaggupādāya avīci heṭṭhato - etthantare sattakāyūpapannā rūpī arūpī ca asaññisaññino - dukkhā pamuccantu phusantu nibbutiṃ

devo vassatu kālena - sassa sampattihetu ca phīto bhavatu loko ca - rājā bhavatu dhammiko.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 23. Sugatovāda (the Buddha’s Daily Admonishment):
content:
appamādena bhikkhave sampādetha,

dullabho buddhuppādo lokasmiṃ,

dullabho manussattapaṭilābho, dullabhā khaṇasampatti, dullabhā pabbajjā,

dullabhaṃ saddhammasavanaṃ,

dullabho sappurisasaṃsevo.

Ārabhatha nikkhamatha yuñjatha buddha sāsane, dhunātha maccuno senaṃ naḷāgāraṃva kuñjaro.

Yo imasmiṃ dhamma vinaye appamatto vihessati, pahāya jāti saṃsāraṃ dukkhassantaṃ karissati.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 24. Paccavekkhaṇā:
content:
Cīvara paṭisaṅkhā yoniso cīvaraṃ paṭisevāmi – ‘Yāvadeva sītassa paṭighātāya, uṇhassa paṭighātāya, ḍaṃsamakasavātātapasiriṃsapasamphassānaṃ paṭighātāya, yāvadeva hirikopīnapaṭicchādanatthaṃ’.

Piṇḍapāta

Paṭisaṅkhā yoniso piṇḍapātaṃ paṭisevāmi – ‘Neva davāya na madāya na maṇḍanāya na vibhūsanāya, yāvadeva imassa kāyassa ṭhitiyā yāpanāya, vihiṃsūparatiyā brahmacariyānuggahāya, iti purāṇañca vedanaṃ paṭihaṅkhāmi, navañca vedanaṃ na uppādessāmi, yātrā ca me bhavissati anavajjatā ca phāsuvihāro cāti.

Senāsana

Paṭisaṅkhā yoniso senāsanaṃ paṭisevāmi –‘Yāvadeva sītassa paṭighātāya, uṇhassa paṭighātāya, ḍaṃsamakasavātātapasarīsapasamphassānaṃ paṭighātāya, yāvadeva utuparissayavinodanaṃ paṭisallānārāmatthaṃ’.

Gilānappaccaya

Paṭisaṅkhā yoniso gilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāraṃ paṭisevāmi –‘Yāvadeva uppannānaṃ veyyābādhikānaṃ vedanānaṃ paṭighātāya, abyābajjhaparamatāyā’ti.

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 25. Paṭipatti Pūjā adhiṭṭhāna:
content:
imāya dhammānudhammapaṭipattiyā buddhaṃ pūjemi!

imāya dhammānudhammapaṭipattiyā dhammaṃ pūjemi!

imāya dhammānudhammapaṭipattiyā saṃghaṃ pūjemi!

addhā imāya paṭipattiyā jāti, jarā, maraṇamhā parimuccissāmī’ti!

heading: Evening Chanting Sunday
title: 26. Khamāpana gāthā (Asking for fougiveness):
content:
kāyena vācācittena pamādena mayā kataṃ

accayaṃ khama me bhante bhūripañña tathāgata.

Kāyena vācācittena pamādena mayā kataṃ

accayaṃ khama me dhamma sandiṭṭhika akālika.

Kāyena vācācittena pamādena mayā kataṃ

accayaṃ khama me saṃgha puññakkhetta anuttara.

Sādhu! sādhu! sādhu!
